string 2: Since I can predict the future, I have no blind spots in battle.
You never, ever lose?

I cannot. That is who I am.
When push comes to shove, I will wipe everything out.
How do you predict the future?

With the ultimate power, Omni inForce.
It allows me to read the future in an instant.
I want that power.

Omni inForce is mine, and mine alone.
It is not something a human could ever wield.
I won't let you predict my future.

I may not be able to read humans, but neither am I
charged with facing them in battle.

Would you be so kind as to think of a word
or words that properly describe me?
Supreme.

Suitable for one such as I, clad in sacred hybrid armor,
impervious to any threat.
Loyalty.

It is a great honor to be associated with
a term so near to the tenets of chivalry.
A Holy Knight.

A tad on the nose, but... bearing holy power
is a weighty task that I must see through.
A guardian deity.

Being called such once more reminds me
of the great duty I bear. My battle continues!
I must train this body of mine to perfection.
Don't you think you've done enough?

My armor gets stronger as I train it, turning into
Gold Digizoid. I must do even more!
Is that stuff... flesh?

My Chrondigizoid grows and atrophies as I do.
It makes sense to call it flesh, no?
Let's train together!

My training may differ from a human's, but I am
happy to train with a like-minded spirit.
I'm rooting for you!

It goes without saying, but thank you.
Your words are the greatest encouragement.
Nothing can damage me.
You're really sure of yourself, huh?

I now possess both godlike speed and wondrous
healing abilities. I have no weaknesses.
You must get injured sometimes, though, right?

Never. My supreme power, Ulforce,
instantly heals me of all harm.
Yeah, I know.

Then you must also know you need not worry
on my account. Entrust me with any task.
Somehow that worries me...

I am fully equipped to handle any peril.
I promise that you need not worry.

Since my armor's covered in blades,
give me a nickname that suits me!
Omni-Attacker!

A moniker reflecting my imperviousness!
I shall unleash an assault worthy of the name.
Full-Body Weapon!

Right on the money! And remember that
the swords I have equipped attack on their own.
Iron-Fist Judgment!

My special move, is it not?
Still, the term does seem to embody me perfectly.
Autonomous Blades!

Splendidly easy to understand.
I shall ensure that my attacks do the moniker justice.
